title: engines.engine_run_completed
description: T7:engines engine_run_completed event payload (WS-263, ADR-037 Phase 2). Emitted at the end of every /engine invocation. Reducer materializes state/engines.json so engine_history_count is replay-pure derivable.

backfilled.description: True for synthetic events emitted by scripts/migrate-engine-history.js. Real events from /engine omit this field.
